responsibilities: • prepare and maintain financial statements for international entities   • handle multi -currency accounting and foreign exchange adjustments   • ensure compliance with ifrs and local country accounting regulations   • coordinate with overseas subsidiaries and finance teams   • manage intercompany transactions and reconciliations   • support international audits and regulatory reporting   • monitor international tax implications and transfer pricing basics
qualifications: • chartered accountant (ca) or equivalent   • strong knowledge of ifrs   • experience with global erp systems (sap, oracle, netsuite)   • excellent communication and cross -cultural coordination skills
